T0061.title: Fee Refund Abuse
T0061.definition: Refers to the refunding of financial charges such as annual fees, processing fees, membership fees, entitlement fees, interest, and penalty fees. While originally a standard financial term, it is used here specifically to describe malicious exploitation by underground actors.
T0061.description: Refers to the refunding of financial charges such as annual fees, processing fees, membership fees, entitlement fees, interest, and penalty fees. While originally a standard financial term, it is used here specifically to describe malicious exploitation by underground actors.
T0061.usageExample: 中介帮他把网贷的利息全退回来了，收了30%的手续费，还让他把通讯录里的朋友都介绍过来做退息退费。

references.title: Exposing the Underground Industry Behind Illegal "Agent Rights Protection" in the Financial Sector
